since_last: 76% of 84 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +5.61%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 76% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.58% · BTC +1.27% · Gold +1.58% · Nasdaq100 +1.39%. 76% of 84 AI names are green — a broad bid. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +5.61%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, AI Applications & Data Software lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +5.61%; weakest is AI Applications & Data Software at -0.05%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: ARM is the standout at +11.26%
cards.body: Leaders: ARM +11.26%, SYNA +9.95%, CEVA +7.93%, MU +7.40%, KLAC +7.39%. Laggards: AVAV -4.69%, PLTR -4.31%, SOUN -3.46%, GOOGL -2.34%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +1.43% at $150.42
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +1.43% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
